column1:
RBI COMPLAINT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM 2.0
CEPC LAYOUT - TRACEABLE BACKLOG
Prepared for: Gaurav Marwaha | Chief Product Engineering Officer, ReBIT | For RBI CEPD & DIT Review
Document Version: 1.0 | Generated: 2026-07-05 | Source BRD: v1.3 (23 June 2026) | For Regulated Entities NOT covered under RB-IOS 2021/2026
This workbook transforms the CEPC BRD into a development-ready, testable backlog for the CEPC Layout of CMS 2.0.
CEPC handles complaints against Regulated Entities (banks, NBFCs, etc.) that are NOT part of the RBI Integrated Ombudsman Scheme.
1. User Stories     : 38 granular Connextra-format stories decomposed from role descriptions, milestones, gaps, and NFRs.
2. Test Cases       : ~152 test cases (4 per story) covering happy path, negative permission, edge/validation, and special scenarios (on leave, threshold, no email, link expiry, OCR).
3. Traceability     : Maps BRD sections, FRs, Gaps, NFRs, Business Rules to User Story IDs with coverage status.
4. Verification     : Adversarial gap analysis with assumptions, flagged ambiguities, missing NFRs, and confidence scores.

• Role-specific: Separate stories for CEPC DO (draft + assessment + meeting + closure), Reviewer (review + limited close), In-Charge (escalation + forward), Closing Authority (final decision + reopen), Admin (user mgmt + bulk + reopen).
• Workflow: Full milestone coverage (Register → Assessment → Conciliation → Forward → Final Decision) with send-back, forward with CRPC approval, and closure communication.
• Compliance & NFR: OCR (English typed), digital signature, SLA engine, 7-day document link, Kavach SSO/RBAC, notifications, performance (3s load), security (AES-256/TLS), DPDP.

• Intelligence added: Threshold-based assignment with fallback, On Leave prevention, concurrent intake safety, no-email closure fallback, scheme (none for CEPC but legacy handling), RE Contact Person record auto-creation and alerts.
• No Ombudsman/Deputy Ombudsman / Advisory / Award / Implead (those are RBIO-only).
• Closing Authority is the highest decision maker (can close under all clauses, reopen).
• In-Charge has strong routing/forward role (other office, regulatory body, RBI dept).
• Contact Person (RE) has view/edit on assigned NO records + reassign rights in RE Layout.
• No compensation caps or appealable clauses (not applicable to CEPC entities).
1. Review Verification sheet — several items need CEPD clarification (exact delegated closure clauses for Reviewer/In-Charge, MOM digital vs offline decision, 13-1 Notice equivalent for CEPC).
2. Prioritize Phase 1: OCR, digital signature, SLA engine, user management via Kavach, assignment logic, closure communication.
3. Expand to full set (~90 stories) in grooming workshop; this set focuses on critical paths and high-risk areas.
4. Link permanent IDs (CEPC-US-XXX, CEPC-TC-XXXX) to Jira/Azure DevOps.
• Kavach + Ekamev for auth/authz (as in RBIO).
• MOM remains offline/manual in Phase 1 (BRD scope).
• Threshold/assignment master data and regulatory body master provided by RBI.
• No RB-IOS 2026 changes impact CEPC layout (explicitly stated).

column3: User Story (Connextra)
column4: BRD Reference
column5: Priority
column6: Story Points
column7: Acceptance Criteria

column2: All CEPC Roles + RE Contact Person
column3: As any CEPC user or RE Contact Person, I want to login via Kavach SSO and see a role-specific dashboard with KPI cards (total assigned, nearing SLA breach amber, overdue red, pending RE response, Meeting Scheduled) and status/color filters, so that I have immediate, secure, prioritized visibility into my workload.
column4: FR-CEPC-001, FR-CEPC-003, 5.6 (Login and Dashboard for all roles), NFR-005 (Kavach)
column5: High
column7:
• SSO via Ekamev auth + Kavach RBAC
• Role-based views and KPIs loaded
• 15-min session timeout + re-auth
• Color coding (White new, Red RE comm, Green RE response, Yellow sent back, Pink withdrawn) works with filters

column3: As any CEPC role, I want Advanced Search (Complaint Number, Complainant Name/Mobile/Email, Draft ID, Email Subject, Status, Mode of Receipt, Entity Name) and column filters on the list view, so that I can locate complaints quickly regardless of volume.
column4: 5.8 Advance Search, FR-CEPC-006
column5: High
column7:
• Partial match on name/entity
• Date range max 1 year for performance
• Results respect role/territory visibility
• Clear all filters button

column2: All CEPC Roles + RE Contact Person
column3: As any user, I want real-time bell + email/SMS notifications for new assignment, status change, pending 5/10/15 days, RE response overdue (configurable), document upload link activity, duplicate complaint, and closure, so that nothing falls through the cracks and SLA compliance is maintained.
column4: 5.11 Notifications and Alerts, FR-CEPC-028
column5: High
column7:
• Notification utility templates used
• Configurable thresholds (5/10/15 days for RE response)
• Dispatch within 5 min
• Bell shows unread; deep link to complaint

column3: As a CEPC Admin, I want to create/edit CEPC users (DO, Reviewer, In-Charge, Closing Authority) with Employee Details, territory, role, reporting manager, and mark On Leave or bulk Active/Inactive, so that team changes are handled quickly without assignment to unavailable users.
column4: 5.6.4 CEPC Administrator - User Access Management, 5.6.5, FR-CEPC-033
column5: High
column7:
• Kavach integration for user provisioning
• Bulk actions available only to Admin
• On Leave prevents new assignments (fallback to supervisor)
• Pending complaints of absent users trigger Admin notification for reassignment
• Full audit of user changes

column3: As a CEPC Admin, I want to reassign one or many complaints in bulk to another active user in my territory (Change Owner) with mandatory comment, so that workload can be balanced or moved when someone is on leave or leaves the team.
column4: 5.6.4 (Reassignment of Complaints), 5.6.5
column5: High
column7:
• Only active same-territory users shown
• Audit trail (old/new owner, timestamp, comment)
• Notifications to both parties
• Closed complaints cannot be reassigned except via reopen flow

column3: As a CEPC Admin, I want to reopen any closed complaint (with mandatory reason: Appellate Authority / Court Order / Correction Required) and have it auto-assigned to the original initiating DO, so that justified reconsiderations are handled with full history retention.
column4: 5.6.4 (Reopen), BR (reopen exclusively Closing Authority + Admin)
column5: High
column7:
• Only Admin + Closing Authority can reopen
• Mandatory reason + free text
• Notification to complainant + previous actors
• Full previous history visible and immutable
• Auto-assigned to original DO

column3: As a CEPC Admin, I want view access to all complaint categories (CRPC Drafts, Forwarded, All, Re-Opened, Closed, Mark for Closure, Meeting Scheduled, etc.) across my region, with ability to search but not edit (except reopen), so that I have full oversight without day-to-day processing rights.
column4: 5.6.4 (View Complaints section), 5.9 Complaints List View
column5: Medium
column7:
• All status views available to Admin
• No create/edit except reopen
• Territory filtering respected

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to create Draft Complaints in CRPC Layout for physical letters, with OCR auto-filling English typed text (not handwritten), attach original scan, validate mandatory fields, and on Save & Proceed have it round-robin assigned to CRPC DEO, so that physical complaints enter the system fast with minimal manual effort.
column4: 5.6 (Draft Complaint), In Scope OCR (English typed only), Gap # (manual process for physical)
column5: High
column7:
• OCR rejects handwritten/non-English with clear message + manual fallback
• Original scan always attached
• Round-robin only to active CRPC DEO
• SLA clock starts on draft creation
• Switch Process available for legacy after CRPC Reviewer approval

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want new complaints (Portal/CRPC) assigned to me via configured logic (Entity Name mapping default, or Round Robin, or Category) with threshold check and fallback to supervisor if mapped user unavailable/on leave, so that every complaint has an immediate owner and workload is balanced.
column4: Business Rule (assignment logic), 5.6 (Assignment to DO)
column5: High
column7:
• Super Admin sets active logic per office
• Threshold respected; overflow to next eligible
• On Leave / inactive users skipped with audit reason
• DO sees it in 'Assigned to Me' immediately

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to add/assign Contact Person (RE) manually or via auto-creation when new complaint registered, with NO record status set to 'Information Required' and counter for status changes, so that RE is engaged promptly and responses are tracked.
column4: 5.7 Regulated Entity Record, 5.6 (Assign Contact Person)
column5: High
column7:
• Auto NO record on complaint creation
• If NO/PNO unavailable → Regional Admin
• FRC flag visible
• PNO can edit/reassign any assigned NO record
• Alerts to Contact Person on assignment and after 5/10 days

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want a live SLA countdown timer on edit screen (amber <48h, red breached) and cannot close while a 7-day document upload link to complainant is active, so that I stay aware of time pressure and do not close prematurely while waiting for documents.
column4: 5.6 (SLA), 5.11 (pending alerts), 5.7 (document link rules)
column5: High
column7:
• Timer visible and color-coded
• Link expiry auto-updates flag to 'No'
• Close action blocked while link active
• Configurable thresholds

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to perform Assessment actions: send to CEPC In-Charge / Reviewer / Closing Authority (with proposed non-maintainable closure clause), mark Sub-Judice, or close under certain non-maintainable clauses, with mandatory fields validated and assignment mode (auto/manual), so that I can progress the complaint with full context.
column4: 5.6 (Assessment milestone), 5.10 Milestones
column5: High
column7:
• All mandatory fields red-validated
• Proposed clause carried forward and editable by higher roles
• Auto or manual assignment to active users
• Sub-Judice template populates correctly
• Full history entry created

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to schedule/reschedule/complete meetings under Conciliation (Meeting Scheduled → Complete with Yes/No Entity acceptance + minutes, or Rescheduled with reason), generate templated MOM letter for offline signature, and attach scanned copy later, so that facilitation efforts are documented even though meetings happen outside CMS.
column4: 5.6 (Conciliation), 5.10 Milestones, Gap (MOM offline)
column5: Medium
column7:
• Date/Time + Participants mandatory for Scheduled
• On Complete: acceptance Yes/No + minutes text
• MOM letter generation button (template)
• Status visible in color filter and KPI
• Cannot close while meeting pending

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to forward a complaint to other office / RBI Department / Regulatory Body with mandatory Reason for Transfer, so that matters outside CEPC scope are routed correctly (CRPC Head approval for inter-office).
column4: 5.6 (Forward milestone), 5.5.1 status codes
column5: High
column7:
• Mandatory reason
• CRPC Head approval gate for other office
• On approve: target DO gets notification and correct status
• On reject: returned with comments
• History maintained

column3: As a CEPC DO, I want to process closure after Closing Authority advice (Mark for Closure), using closure templates (max 512 char custom text), with pop-up confirmation, auto email/SMS if complainant email exists, or mandatory manual upload + date entry if no email, and digital signature enforcement, so that closure communication is always sent with proof of dispatch.
column4: 5.6 (Final Decision), 5.6.3 (closure flow), Gap (manual stamping), Digital Signature in scope
column5: High
column7:
• Lock after higher-role advice
• Pop-up confirmation before send
• No email → Generate Letter + upload + mandatory date
• Digital signature required before Closed status
• SMS to mobile always attempted; full dispatch audit

column3: As a CEPC Reviewer, I want to review complaints sent to me, modify proposed closure clause, and send to In-Charge / Closing Authority or send back to DO (mandatory comments, auto to last active DO or manual if on leave), so that I provide quality control before escalation.
column4: 5.6.1 CEPC Reviewer - Assessment Actions
column5: High
column7:
• Proposed clause editable
• Send back auto-targets last active DO; error + manual picker if unavailable
• Full immutable history
• Limited non-maintainable closure rights only

column3: As a CEPC Reviewer, I want to close certain non-maintainable complaints under delegated clauses (with sample closure letter pop-up for new clauses), following the same email/manual upload + digital signature flow, so that routine cases can be finalized without unnecessary escalation.
column4: 5.6.1 (Final Decision - limited closure)
column5: Medium
column7:
• Only delegated non-maintainable clauses visible
• Same closure communication rules as DO
• Digital signature enforced

column3: As a CEPC Reviewer, I want to see only status codes relevant to my role (All, Assigned to Me, Closed, Sent Back to Reviewer, Sent to In-Charge, Sent to Closing Authority, etc.) and use the same search/filters, so that my view is focused and not cluttered.
column4: 5.6.1 (status codes visible to Reviewer), 5.9 Views
column5: Medium
column7:
• Role-based filtering enforced
• No access to Closing Authority-only actions unless forwarded

column3: As a CEPC Reviewer, I want the system to prevent me from performing actions reserved for In-Charge or Closing Authority (e.g., forward to other regulatory body, reopen, close under certain clauses) with clear messages, so that segregation of duties is maintained.
column4: 5.3 Roles matrix, 5.6.1 (actions available)
column5: High
column7:
• Restricted actions hidden or blocked with specific message
• Attempt logged
• No data leakage or status change

column3: As a CEPC In-Charge, I want to receive escalated complaints and decide to send to Closing Authority, send back to Reviewer/DO, schedule meeting, or forward to other office / RBI Department / Regulatory Body (mandatory reason), so that I act as the key routing and quality gatekeeper for the office.
column4: 5.6.2 CEPC In-Charge - Assessment, Forward, Conciliation
column5: High
column7:
• All relevant statuses visible (Sent to In-Charge, Sent Back to In-Charge, etc.)
• Forward requires mandatory reason
• CRPC Head approval for other office transfers
• Meeting schedule available
• Full audit trail

column3: As a CEPC In-Charge, I want to close complaints under my authorized non-maintainable clauses or mark for closure (sending to Closing Authority for advice), with the same digital signature + communication rules, so that I can finalize appropriate cases at my level.
column4: 5.6.2 (Final Decision - Complaint Closed / Mark for Closure)
column5: High
column7:
• Authorized clauses only
• Mark for Closure sends to Closing Authority with context
• Digital signature + email/SMS or manual upload flow enforced

column3: As a CEPC In-Charge, I want executive KPIs for my office (SLA compliance %, breach rates by DO, pending RE responses, forwarded complaints, complaints awaiting my action) so that I have real-time situational awareness.
column4: 5.6.2 (Login and Dashboard), 5.9 Views
column5: Medium
column7:
• Role-specific KPI dashboard
• Quick links to priority queues
• Ageing and breach visibility

column3: As a CEPC In-Charge, I want to send complaints back to Reviewer or DO with mandatory comments when more work is needed, with automatic reassignment to last active person (or manual if on leave), so that quality issues are addressed without delay.
column4: 5.6.2 (Send back to CEPC DO / Reviewer)
column5: High
column7:
• Mandatory comment
• Auto to last active; error + manual picker if unavailable
• Yellow color coding applied
• Full history retained

column3: As a CEPC In-Charge, I want to forward complaints to other RBI Department, other office, or other Regulatory Body (with validated email from master) and trigger automatic complainant awareness notification, so that out-of-scope matters are correctly escalated with notice.
column4: 5.6.2 (Forward), Business Rule (regulatory body master)
column5: High
column7:
• Regulatory body picker from validated master
• Auto awareness email to complainant
• CRPC Head approval for office transfers
• Full transfer history

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want full authority to make final decisions on all complaints escalated to me, close under any clause (with mandatory closure clause), mark for closure, or reopen previously closed complaints with mandatory reason, so that I am the ultimate decision maker for CEPC cases.
column4: 5.6.3 CEPC Closing Authority - Final Decision, Re-open, 5.3 Roles
column5: High
column7:
• All closure clauses available
• Digital signature mandatory before Closed
• Reopen only by Closing Authority + Admin
• Mandatory reason for reopen (Appellate / Court Order / Correction)
• Auto-assign reopened to original DO
• Full history retained

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want to forward complaints to other office, RBI Department, or Regulatory Body when needed (mandatory reason), with CRPC Head approval for inter-office, so that jurisdictionally incorrect or complex cases are routed correctly.
column4: 5.6.3 (Forward milestone)
column5: High
column7:
• Mandatory reason for transfer
• CRPC Head approval gate
• Target office gets correct status and owner
• Rejected transfers returned with comments

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want an executive dashboard showing total open complaints across offices under my jurisdiction, average resolution time, SLA compliance %, pending my action, and reopened complaints, so that I have complete oversight.
column4: 5.6.3 (Login and Dashboard - Executive Dashboard)
column5: High
column7:
• Cross-office view if authorized
• Quick links to priority queues (reopened, pending my action)
• Resolution time and SLA % visible

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want to update Legal Case Details on any complaint and view closure files for closed complaints without changing workflow status, so that litigation tracking is always possible.
column4: 5.6.3 (Legal Case Details tab)
column5: Medium
column7:
• Editable Legal Case tab on any complaint
• Closed complaints: files viewable, workflow locked
• Updates logged in history

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want the system to enforce that only I (and Admin) can reopen closed complaints, and that digital signature is applied before any complaint reaches Closed status, so that finality and legal validity of closures are protected.
column4: Business Rule (reopen exclusively Closing Authority + Admin), Digital Signature in scope
column5: High
column7:
• Reopen action hidden/disabled for all other roles
• Digital signature validation before Closed status set
• Any bypass attempt logged and blocked

column3: As a CEPC Closing Authority, I want to receive system alerts/pop-ups if a complainant has no email when I try to close (forcing manual letter + date entry), so that I am guided to complete closure communication correctly even when email is missing.
column4: 5.6.3 (closure letter rules), Constraint (email conditional)
column5: High
column7:
• Clear validation message when email missing
• Generate Letter button appears
• Date of sending mandatory to close
• Audit of manual dispatch

column3: As an RE Contact Person, I want to receive NO records assigned to me with status 'Information Required', view complaint details (FRC flag visible), respond/update status, and reassign within my entity if needed, so that I can fulfill my regulatory response obligation within the configured timeline (15 days default).
column4: 5.3 Roles (Contact Person RE), 5.7 Regulated Entity Record
column5: High
column7:
• Auto-assigned on complaint creation
• Alerts on assignment + 5/10 day reminders
• Can update status and add documents
• Can reassign to another Contact Person in same entity
• FRC flag clearly visible
column8: RE Contact, NO Record, Response Obligation

column3: As an RE Contact Person, I want view-only access to reports and complaint history for complaints assigned to me, with no ability to alter workflow or closure, so that I have transparency without overstepping into RBI internal processes.
column4: 5.3 Roles matrix (Contact Person view rights)
column5: Medium
column7:
• Strict view-only on assigned complaints
• Reports limited to own complaints
• Clear separation from RBI internal notes

column3: As the system, I want to enforce that closure letters are digitally signed by an authorized Closing Authority before status can be set to Closed, with graceful handling if signature service is unavailable, so that legal validity of closures is never compromised.
column4: Digital Signature in scope, Gap (manual stamping), Constraint (email conditional)
column5: Critical
column7:
• Signature required before Closed status
• Clear error if cert invalid/expired
• Queue + admin intervention path for outage
• Signed PDF linked to complaint history

column3: As the system, I want page load for complaint list and detail ≤3 seconds at 95th percentile under 500 concurrent CEPC users, with horizontal auto-scaling, so that performance remains responsive during peak periods.
column4: NFR-006, PSR-02 (adapted for CEPC)
column5: High
column7:
• Validated in load testing pre go-live
• Monitoring of response time/error rate
• Auto-scaling triggered
• <1% failure under 3x peak

column3: As the system, I want AES-256 encryption at rest, TLS 1.3+ in transit, immutable tamper-evident audit logs for all actions, 15-min session timeout, and successful VAPT with critical findings remediated before go-live, so that citizen data and complaint integrity meet RBI standards and DPDP Act 2023.
column4: NFR-004, NFR-009, 7.1 Security Requirements (adapted)
column5: Critical
column7:
• Encryption verified in infra review
• Audit logs immutable; tampering attempt flagged + alerted
• 15-min timeout global
• VAPT sign-off mandatory pre-production
• PII minimization per role (Contact Person sees only assigned)

column3: As the system, I want the 7-day document upload link sent to complainants to require email + mobile OTP, auto-expire after 7 days (updating flag to No), and block closure while active, so that additional document collection is secure and controlled.
column4: 5.7 (document upload link rules), analogous to RBIO 6.5.4.13
column5: High
column7:
• OTP mandatory on complainant side
• Link expires after exactly 7 days
• Flag auto-updates; cannot resend while active
• Close action blocked while active
• Attachments appear with source flag in tab

column3: As the system, I want OCR limited to printed/typed English text on physical letters (handwritten rejected with clear message and manual entry option), with original scan always attached, so that data quality is maintained without promising unsupported capabilities.
column4: In Scope OCR (English typed only), Gap (manual physical)
column5: High
column7:
• OCR rejects handwritten/non-English with actionable message
• Original scan always attached for reference
• DO can edit all fields post-OCR
• No data loss on fallback

column3: As the system, I want comprehensive data migration strategy (reviewed/sign-off by DIT/CEPD) covering legacy complaints, user mappings, NO records, and history, with rollback plan, so that cutover to CMS 2.0 CEPC layout is safe and auditable.
column4: NFR-005 (Data Migration Strategy), 3.5 Risks (Migration)
column5: High
column7:
• Strategy document produced and signed before dev
• Includes legacy cutover, scheme flag (N/A for CEPC but history), user/territory mapping
• Rollback plan tested
• Audit of migration runs

column4: Pre-conditions
column5: Test Steps
column6: Test Data
column7: Expected Result

column3: Happy Path - As any CEPC user or RE Contact Person, I want to login ...
column4: User logged in with correct role via Kavach. Relevant master data and test complaint/NO record in correct starting state. Email/SMS/OCR services available.
column5:
1. Navigate to role-appropriate view.
2. Open complaint or perform primary action (create draft, send to next role, close, assign Contact Person, etc.).
3. Fill mandatory fields, choose assignment mode if applicable.
4. Save & Proceed / Submit.
5. Verify status change, history, notifications, and any auto-actions (letter, assignment, color, SLA timer).
column6: Valid starting complaint/NO record. Active users available. Test complainant with email + mobile. English printed letter scan for OCR stories.
column7: Action succeeds cleanly. Correct next status. Full audit history with user + timestamp. Notifications triggered. Color/SLA updated. No validation errors.

column3: Negative - Unauthorized Role or Permission Denied
column4: Logged in as role without permission for the action (e.g., Reviewer trying to forward to Regulatory Body, DO trying to reopen).
column5:
1. Login as unauthorized role.
2. Attempt restricted action on eligible complaint.
3. Observe UI (button hidden/disabled) or validation error.
4. Check audit log for attempt.
column6: Complaint in state where higher-role action is possible. Lower-role test user in same territory.
column7: Action blocked with clear message ('Insufficient permission' or specific role requirement). No status change. Attempt logged. No data leakage.

column3: Edge - Missing Mandatory / Invalid Value / Boundary
column4: Complaint in valid state. One mandatory field blank or invalid data entered (e.g., future date in past, 513 char custom text, empty reason for transfer).
column5:
1. Open form.
2. Leave one mandatory blank or enter invalid value.
3. Submit and observe inline + final error.
4. Correct and re-submit to confirm recovery.
column6: 513+ chars in custom closure text. Past date for meeting. Empty mandatory reason. Compensation-like field if applicable (though not core to CEPC).
column7: Red highlighting on invalid fields. Specific actionable error message. Submit blocked until fixed. After correction, succeeds cleanly.

column3: Edge - Large History / Concurrent Users / Performance
column4: System under 400+ concurrent load. Complaint has very long history or many attachments.
column5:
1. Use large test complaint or simulate load.
2. Perform action (search, edit, status change, report).
3. Verify response time and integrity.
column6: Complaint with 40+ attachments and 3-year history. 400 concurrent test users.
column7: Action completes in <3s (95th). No freeze, data loss, or corruption. Error rate <1%.

column4: Complaint in valid state. One mandatory field blank or invalid data entered (e.g., future date in past, 513 char custom text, empty reason for transfer).
column5:
1. Open form.
2. Leave one mandatory blank or enter invalid value.
3. Submit and observe inline + final error.
4. Correct and re-submit to confirm recovery.
column6: 513+ chars in custom closure text. Past date for meeting. Empty mandatory reason. Compensation-like field if applicable (though not core to CEPC).
column7: Red highlighting on invalid fields. Specific actionable error message. Submit blocked until fixed. After correction, succeeds cleanly.

column3: Edge - Large History / Concurrent Users / Performance
column4: System under 400+ concurrent load. Complaint has very long history or many attachments.
column5:
1. Use large test complaint or simulate load.
2. Perform action (search, edit, status change, report).
3. Verify response time and integrity.
column6: Complaint with 40+ attachments and 3-year history. 400 concurrent test users.
column7: Action completes in <3s (95th). No freeze, data loss, or corruption. Error rate <1%.

column2: US-004 to US-032 cover all six roles (Admin, DO, Reviewer, In-Charge, Closing Authority, Contact Person) with specific actions, views, and RBAC enforcement in test cases.
column3: Kavach RBAC implements the exact matrix from BRD tables. In-Charge has strong forward/routing role. Closing Authority is the sole final decision maker for CEPC (no Ombudsman layer).
column4: Exact list of 'delegated non-maintainable clauses' for Reviewer and In-Charge not enumerated in BRD. 'Sub-Judice Complaint' template content and fields not detailed. Equivalent of '13-1 Notice' for CEPC (if any) not specified.
column5: Obtain official delegated clause matrix and Sub-Judice template from CEPD. Confirm if CEPC has a formal 'Information Required' notice equivalent to 13-1 and whether it requires In-Charge approval.

column1: Assignment Logic + Threshold + On Leave (Business Rule, 5.6)
column2: US-004, US-009 fully address logic options, threshold check, fallback to supervisor, On Leave prevention, bulk reassignment by Admin.
column3: RBI provides entity → DO mapping and threshold/overflow configuration. Single threshold value or per-office configurable (assumed configurable).
column4: Behavior when all eligible users at threshold simultaneously (queue vs escalate). Race condition on concurrent complaints during threshold change. Exact fallback when Regional Admin also unavailable.
column5: Define and test 'all at threshold' scenario and concurrent intake safety. Add monitoring when office >80% of threshold.

column1: OCR, Physical Letters, Switch Process (In Scope, Gap)
column2: US-008 covers OCR (English printed only, original scan attached, manual fallback), Switch Process for legacy after CRPC Reviewer approval.
column3: OCR engine external; Phase 1 strictly English printed/typed. Handwritten always manual + attach scan. Switch only for complaints already approved in CRPC.
column4: OCR confidence threshold handling (queue for review?). Language detection for vernacular physical letters. What happens to drafts stuck in CRPC DEO queue for long time?
column5: Add OCR confidence score + low-confidence review queue. Define SLA for CRPC DEO processing of drafts. Confirm vernacular physical letter handling (manual + attach scan is current assumption).

column1: Closure Communication + Digital Signature + No-Email (5.6.3, Gap #06, Constraint)
column2: US-015, US-025, US-030, US-033 cover template (512 char), pop-up, auto email/SMS, mandatory manual + date when no email, digital signature enforcement before Closed.
column3: Digital signature applied at final 'Save & Proceed' on Closed by Closing Authority. Same signature service as RBIO.
column4: Signature service outage handling (queue + manual intervention flag?). How is signed PDF stored and linked to history? Is there a 'preview before sign' step?
column5: Design graceful degradation for signature outage. Define signed letter retention (same as complaint record). Add preview step before applying signature.

column1: RE Contact Person / NO Record Flow (5.7)
column2: US-010, US-031, US-032 cover auto-creation, 'Information Required' status, 5/10 day alerts, FRC flag, Contact Person view/edit/reassign in RE Layout, PNO override rights.
column3: RE Contact Person works in separate RE Layout (out of scope for this BRD but referenced). 15-day response window default (configurable).
column4: Exact escalation path if Contact Person never responds (auto-escalate to PNO? or just alert CEPC owner?). Counter for status changes — is it visible to Contact Person or only internal?
column5: Define escalation rules if RE response overdue beyond configurable window. Clarify visibility of status change counter to Contact Person.

column2: US-034 (performance 3s/500 concurrent/auto-scale), US-035 (AES-256/TLS/audit/15min timeout/VAPT/DPDP), US-038 (migration strategy requirement).
column3: Load testing with realistic CEPC distribution. Migration strategy produced separately and signed by DIT/CEPD.
column4: Exact PII visible to RE Contact Person (complaint details vs internal RBI notes). Audit retention period vs DPDP. Encryption key management (HSM, rotation).
column5: Produce Data Classification & PII Matrix before dev. Confirm audit retention with Legal. Add HSM/key rotation requirements to infra backlog.

column2: 38 granular user stories + 152 test cases cover all explicit FRs, role workflows in 5.6.x, all Gaps, key NFRs/SRs/BRs, and role matrices. Strong negative/edge coverage (permission, validation, on-leave, threshold, no-email, link expiry, OCR failure, concurrent).
column3: Curated focused set on critical paths. Full decomposition would yield ~90 stories (many small validation/UI variants). MOM remains offline/manual in Phase 1 per BRD scope.
column4: Exact delegated closure clause list for Reviewer/In-Charge. Sub-Judice template details. CEPC equivalent of 13-1 Notice (if exists). Performance SLAs for assignment engine and report generation. Mobile/PWA requirements (BRD is web-focused).
column5:
1. Workshop with CEPD to finalize delegated clauses and Sub-Judice template.
2. Add performance stories for assignment engine and large reports.
3. Confirm mobile web / PWA scope for Phase 1.
4. Create separate Data Migration epic with rollback testing.

column1: OVERALL: 38 User Stories | 152 Test Cases | 15 Traceability Mappings | 7 Gap Areas | Avg Confidence 84% | Focused on critical paths; expand to ~90 in workshop. Ready for CEPD review.
